# AUTO-GENERATED Men-at-Arms scripted_guis — do not edit by hand
# One spawner effect per MAA key

### Horse Archers Spawner
DI_horse_archers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = horse_archers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = horse_archers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = horse_archers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = horse_archers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Asawira Spawner
DI_asawira_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {

			save_scope_as = DI_story

			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = asawira
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = asawira
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = asawira
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = teutonic_knights
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {

					type = teutonic_knights
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}

### Trebuchet Spawner
DI_trebuchet_effect = {
	scope = character

			limit = {

			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }

					men_at_arms = {

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = trebuchet
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

					type = trebuchet
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location

	scope = character

					men_at_arms = {
						type = bombard
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = bombard
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = bombard
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no

### War Elephant Spawner
DI_war_elephant_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }

			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }

					men_at_arms = {
						type = war_elephant

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = war_elephant
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

					type = war_elephant
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value

				location = root.location

				name = war_elephant

	effect = {

			}

						type = accolade_maa_archers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = accolade_maa_archers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {

				men_at_arms = {
					type = accolade_maa_archers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}

### Accolade Maa Skirmishers Spawner
DI_accolade_maa_skirmishers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = accolade_maa_skirmishers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = accolade_maa_skirmishers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = accolade_maa_skirmishers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = accolade_maa_skirmishers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Accolade Maa Pikes Spawner
DI_accolade_maa_pikes_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = accolade_maa_pikes
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = accolade_maa_pikes
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = accolade_maa_pikes
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = accolade_maa_pikes
			}
		}
	}
}

	scope = character

		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = handpicked_faithful
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = handpicked_faithful
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = handpicked_faithful
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = handpicked_faithful
			}
		}
	}
}

			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = pesilat_warriors
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = pesilat_warriors
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = pesilat_warriors
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = pesilat_warriors
			}
		}
	}
}

	scope = character

	effect = {

			}

					men_at_arms = {
						type = samurai
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}

				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = narudbriyig_hillriders
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = narudbriyig_hillriders
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = narudbriyig_hillriders
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = narudbriyig_hillriders
			}
		}
	}
}

### Bozishnarud Battlemasters Spawner
DI_bozishnarud_battlemasters_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = bozishnarud_battlemasters
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no

			}

		else = {

					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = easterling_swordsmen
			}
		}
	}
}

### Loke Innas Rim Spawner
DI_loke_innas_rim_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = loke_innas_rim
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = loke_innas_rim
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = loke_innas_rim
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = loke_innas_rim
			}
		}
	}
}

			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = rhovanion_royal_guard
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = rhovanion_royal_guard
			}
		}
	}
}

### Rhovanion Heavy Cavalry Spawner
DI_rhovanion_heavy_cavalry_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = rhovanion_heavy_cavalry
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = rhovanion_heavy_cavalry
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = rhovanion_heavy_cavalry
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = rhovanion_heavy_cavalry
			}
		}
	}
}

					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = shorewardens
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = shorewardens
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = shorewardens
			}
		}
	}
}

	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {

					men_at_arms = {
						type = waw_pirates
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = waw_pirates
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = waw_pirates
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = waw_pirates
			}
		}
	}
}

### Vulmaw Venturers Spawner
DI_vulmaw_venturers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = vulmaw_venturers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = vulmaw_venturers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = vulmaw_venturers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = vulmaw_venturers
			}
		}
	}
}

		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = ambason_archers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = ambason_archers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = ambason_archers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = ambason_archers
			}
		}
	}
}

	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = caledhrim_footmen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = caledhrim_footmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = caledhrim_footmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = caledhrim_footmen
			}
		}
	}
}

					}

		}

	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = orthanc_guardsmen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = orthanc_guardsmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = orthanc_guardsmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = orthanc_guardsmen
			}
		}
	}
}

### Orthanc Bowmen Spawner

	scope = character

					}

			}
		}

		}

					}

				}
			}
		}
		else = {

				men_at_arms = {
					type = hillmen_heavy_infantry_unlock
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value

### Longbeard Crossbowmen Spawner
DI_longbeard_crossbowmen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = longbeard_crossbowmen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = longbeard_crossbowmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = longbeard_crossbowmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = longbeard_crossbowmen
			}
		}
	}
}

### Longbeard Heavy Infantry Spawner
DI_longbeard_heavy_infantry_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = longbeard_heavy_infantry
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = longbeard_heavy_infantry
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = longbeard_heavy_infantry
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = longbeard_heavy_infantry
			}
		}
	}
}

						type = longbeard_cavalry

					}

					inheritable = no
					name = longbeard_cavalry
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = longbeard_cavalry

		}
		else = {

### Blacklock Skirmishers Spawner
DI_blacklock_skirmishers_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = blacklock_skirmishers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = blacklock_skirmishers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = blacklock_skirmishers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = blacklock_skirmishers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Blacklock Crossbowmen Spawner
DI_blacklock_crossbowmen_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = blacklock_crossbowmen
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = blacklock_crossbowmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = blacklock_crossbowmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = blacklock_crossbowmen
			}
		}
	}
}

	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = grey_elven_archers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = grey_elven_archers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = grey_elven_archers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = grey_elven_archers
			}
		}
	}
}

### Grey Elven Heavy Cavalry Spawner
DI_grey_elven_heavy_cavalry_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = grey_elven_heavy_cavalry
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = grey_elven_heavy_cavalry
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = grey_elven_heavy_cavalry
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = grey_elven_heavy_cavalry
			}
		}
	}

				}
			}
		}
		else = {

			}

					men_at_arms = {
						type = grey_elven_skirmishers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = grey_elven_skirmishers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = grey_elven_skirmishers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = grey_elven_skirmishers
			}

	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}

			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = noldor_swordsmen

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = noldor_swordsmen
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = noldor_swordsmen
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = noldor_swordsmen
			}

### Hir Hathol Spawner
DI_hir_hathol_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = hir_hathol
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = hir_hathol
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = hir_hathol
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = hir_hathol
			}
		}
	}
}

### Falathrim Haven Guard Spawner
DI_falathrim_haven_guard_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = falathrim_haven_guard
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = falathrim_haven_guard
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = falathrim_haven_guard
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = falathrim_haven_guard
			}
		}
	}
}

				men_at_arms = {
					type = war_mumak
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = war_mumak
			}
		}
	}
}

### Haradrim Raiders Spawner
DI_haradrim_raiders_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = haradrim_raiders
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = haradrim_raiders
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = haradrim_raiders
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = haradrim_raiders
			}
		}
	}
}

DI_temple_knights_of_the_eye_effect = {

			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story

						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = temple_knights_of_the_eye
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = temple_knights_of_the_eye
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = temple_knights_of_the_eye
			}
		}
	}
}

### Orc Warriors Spawner
DI_orc_warriors_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = orc_warriors
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = orc_warriors
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = orc_warriors
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = orc_warriors
			}
		}
	}
}

					men_at_arms = {
						type = orc_rabble

					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = orc_rabble

			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {

### Urukhai Monstrosity Spawner
DI_urukhai_monstrosity_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}

				save_scope_as = target

					men_at_arms = {
						type = urukhai_monstrosity
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = urukhai_monstrosity
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = urukhai_monstrosity
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = urukhai_monstrosity
			}
		}
	}
}

### Urukhai Berserker Spawner
DI_urukhai_berserker_effect = {
	scope = character

	effect = {
		random_owned_story = {
			limit = {
				story_type = DI_misc_variables_story
			}
			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = urukhai_berserker
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = urukhai_berserker
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = urukhai_berserker
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = urukhai_berserker
			}
		}
	}
}

			save_scope_as = DI_story
		}
		
		if = {
			limit = {
				scope:DI_story = { has_variable = DI_pinned_char_var }
			}
			every_living_character = {
				limit = { has_character_flag = pinned_for_edit }
				save_scope_as = target

				spawn_army = {
					men_at_arms = {
						type = goblin_spear_throwers
						men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
					}
					location = scope:target.location
					inheritable = no
					name = goblin_spear_throwers
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			spawn_army = {
				men_at_arms = {
					type = goblin_spear_throwers
					men = scope:DI_story.var:DI_army_spawner_increment_value
				}
				location = root.location
				inheritable = no
				name = goblin_spear_throwers
			}
		}
	}
}
